name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with the cedilla fix

- **Distribution**: (e.g., Arch Linux, Fedora 41)

- **Input framework**: (e.g., fcitx5 5.1.12, ibus, none)
- **Keyboard layout**: (e.g., us-intl)
